subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letters were received, as was a supplication seeking forgiveness for the late Mírzá Bahlúl [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه های شما رسید مناجاتی طلب مغفرت بجهت مرحوم میرزا بهلول
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for forgiveness
